questionHtml:
A standing wave is formed on a rope. The distance between the first and fifth antinode on the standing wave is 60 cm. What is the wavelength of the wave?

A.  12 cm

B.  15 cm

C.  24 cm

D.  30 cm

meta.title: A standing wave is formed on a rope. The distance between the first and fifth antinode on the standing wave is 60 cm. What is the wavelength of the wave? A. 12 cm B. 15 cm C. 24 cm
